title: ReMem-VLA: Empowering Vision-Language-Action Model with Memory via Dual-Level Recurrent Queries
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models for closed-loop robot control are typically cast under the Markov assumption, making them prone to errors on tasks requiring historical context. To incorporate memory, existing VLAs either retrieve from a memory bank, which can be misled by distractors, or extend the frame window, whose fixed horizon still limits long-term retention. In this paper, we introduce ReMem-VLA, a Recurrent Memory VLA model equipped with two sets of learnable queries: frame-level recurrent memory queries for propagating information across consecutive frames to support short-term memory, and chunk-level recurrent memory queries for carrying context across temporal chunks for long-term memory. These queries are trained end-to-end to aggregate and maintain relevant context over time, implicitly guiding the model's decisions without additional training or inference cost. Furthermore, to enhance visual memory, we introduce Past Observation Prediction as an auxiliary training objective. Through extensive memory-centric simulation and real-world robot experiments, we demonstrate that ReMem-VLA exhibits strong memory capabilities across multiple dimensions, including spatial, sequential, episodic, temporal, and visual memory. ReMem-VLA significantly outperforms memory-free VLA baselines $π$0.5 and OpenVLA-OFT and surpasses MemoryVLA on memory-dependent tasks by a large margin.
tldr: ReMem-VLA introduces a recurrent memory mechanism for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models using dual-level learnable queries to enhance short-term and long-term memory, outperforming existing methods on memory-dependent tasks.
tldr_zh: ReMem-VLA 提出了一种用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的循环记忆机制，通过双级可学习查询增强短期和长期记忆，在依赖记忆的任务上显著优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 用于闭环机器人控制的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型通常基于马尔可夫假设构建，这使其在执行需要历史上下文的任务时容易出错。为引入记忆机制，现有VLA方案要么从记忆库中检索信息（易受干扰项误导），要么扩展帧窗口（固定时间跨度仍限制长期记忆）。本文提出ReMem-VLA——一种配备两组可学习查询的循环记忆VLA模型：帧级循环记忆查询用于在连续帧间传递信息以实现短期记忆，块级循环记忆查询用于跨时间块传递上下文以实现长期记忆。这些查询通过端到端训练实现相关上下文的动态聚合与维护，无需额外训练或推理成本即可隐式指导模型决策。此外，我们提出"历史观测预测"作为辅助训练目标以增强视觉记忆能力。通过大量以记忆为核心的仿真和真实机器人实验，我们证明ReMem-VLA在空间记忆、序列记忆、情景记忆、时间记忆和视觉记忆等多个维度均表现出强大的记忆能力。ReMem-VLA显著优于无记忆基线模型$π$0.5和OpenVLA-OFT，并在依赖记忆的任务上大幅超越MemoryVLA。

title: AnchorVLA4D: an Anchor-Based Spatial-Temporal Vision-Language-Action Model for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Since current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) systems suffer from limited spatial perception and the absence of memory throughout manipulation, we investigate visual anchors as a means to enhance spatial and temporal reasoning within VLA policies for robotic manipulation. Conventional VLAs generate actions by conditioning on a single current frame together with a language instruction. However, since the frame is encoded as a 2D image, it does not contain detailed spatial information, and the VLA similarly lacks any means to incorporate past context. As a result, it frequently forgets objects under occlusion and becomes spatially disoriented during the manipulation process. Thus, we propose AnchorVLA4D, a simple spatial-temporal VLA that augments the visual input with an anchor image to preserve the initial scene context throughout execution, and adds a lightweight spatial encoder that jointly processes the anchor and current frames to expose geometric relationships within an episode. Built on a Qwen2.5-VL backbone with a diffusion-based action head, AnchorVLA4D requires no additional sensing modalities (e.g., depth or point clouds) and introduces negligible inference overhead. Combining anchoring with a frozen pretrained spatial encoder yields further gains, realizing a 13.6% improvement on the Simpler WidowX benchmark and confirming the approach on real-world tasks, where it achieved an average success rate of 80%.
tldr: AnchorVLA4D enhances Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation by using visual anchors to improve spatial-temporal reasoning, achieving better performance without additional sensors.
tldr_zh: AnchorVLA4D通过使用视觉锚点增强视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的空间-时间推理能力，在不增加额外传感器的情况下提高了机器人操作的性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统在机器人操作中存在空间感知能力有限和全程缺乏记忆的问题，为此我们研究如何利用视觉锚点来增强VLA策略中的时空推理能力。传统VLA系统仅基于单帧当前画面和语言指令生成动作，但由于画面以二维图像形式编码，其空间信息不足，且系统无法整合历史上下文，导致频繁出现遮挡目标遗忘和操作过程中空间迷失的现象。为此，我们提出AnchorVLA4D——一种轻量级时空VLA架构，通过引入锚点图像保持执行过程中的初始场景上下文，并新增空间编码器联合处理锚点帧与当前帧以显式提取任务序列中的几何关系。基于Qwen2.5-VL主干网络和扩散动作头构建的该系统无需额外传感模态（如深度或点云），推理开销几乎可忽略。实验表明，结合预训练冻结空间编码器的锚点机制可带来13.6%的Simper WidowX基准性能提升，在现实任务中更达到80%的平均成功率。

title: A Learning-Based Approach for Contact Detection, Localization, and Force Estimation of Continuum Manipulators With Integrated OFDR Optical Fiber
summary: Continuum manipulators (CMs) are widely used in minimally invasive procedures due to their compliant structure and ability to navigate deep and confined anatomical environments. However, their distributed deformation makes force sensing, contact detection, localization, and force estimation challenging, particularly when interactions occur at unknown arc-length locations along the robot. To address this problem, we propose a cascade learning-based framework (CLF) for CMs instrumented with a single distributed Optical Frequency Domain Reflectometry (OFDR) fiber embedded along one side of the robot. The OFDR sensor provides dense strain measurements along the manipulator backbone, capturing strain perturbations caused by external interactions. The proposed CLF first detects contact using a Gradient Boosting classifier and then estimates contact location and interaction force magnitude using a CNN--FiLM model that predicts a spatial force distribution along the manipulator. Experimental validation on a sensorized tendon-driven CM in an obstructed environment demonstrates that a single distributed OFDR fiber provides sufficient information to jointly infer contact occurrence, location, and force in continuum manipulators.
tldr: The paper proposes a cascade learning-based framework (CLF) for continuum manipulators (CMs) with integrated OFDR optical fiber to detect contact, localize it, and estimate force using a Gradient Boosting classifier and a CNN--FiLM model, validated experimentally.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于级联学习框架（CLF）的方法，用于集成OFDR光纤的连续体机械臂（CMs），通过梯度提升分类器和CNN--FiLM模型检测接触、定位并估计力，并进行了实验验证。
summary_zh: 连续体机械臂（CMs）凭借其柔性结构和在深部狭窄解剖环境中的导航能力，被广泛应用于微创手术。然而，其分布式变形特性使得力觉感知、接触检测、定位及力估计具有挑战性，尤其是当交互作用发生在机器人未知弧长位置时。针对该问题，我们提出一种基于级联学习框架（CLF）的解决方案：通过在机械臂单侧嵌入一根分布式光频域反射（OFDR）光纤作为传感器。该OFDR传感器可沿机械臂主结构提供密集应变测量，捕捉外部交互引起的应变扰动。所提出的CLF首先采用梯度提升分类器进行接触检测，随后通过CNN-FiLM模型预测沿机械臂的空间力分布，进而估算接触位置与交互力大小。在障碍环境中对配备传感器的腱驱动连续体机械臂进行实验验证表明，单根分布式OFDR光纤可为连续体机械臂的接触发生、位置及力的联合推断提供充分信息。

title: Coordinated Manipulation of Hybrid Deformable-Rigid Objects in Constrained Environments
summary: Coordinated robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs), such as ropes and cables, has been widely studied; however, handling hybrid assemblies composed of both deformable and rigid elements in constrained environments remains challenging. This work presents a quasi-static optimization-based manipulation planner that employs a strain-based Cosserat rod model, extending rigid-body formulations to hybrid deformable linear objects (hDLO). The proposed planner exploits the compliance of deformable links to maneuver through constraints while achieving task-space objectives for the object that are unreachable with rigid tools. By leveraging a differentiable model with analytically derived gradients, the method achieves up to a 33x speedup over finite-difference baselines for inverse kinetostatic(IKS) problems. Furthermore, the subsequent trajectory optimization problem, warm-started using the IKS solution, is only practically realizable via analytical derivatives. The proposed algorithm is validated in simulation on various hDLO systems and experimentally on a three-link hDLO manipulated in a constrained environment using a dual-arm robotic system. Experimental results confirm the planner's accuracy, yielding an average deformation error of approximately 3 cm (5% of the deformable link length) between the desired and measured marker positions. Finally, the proposed optimal planner is compared against a sampling-based feasibility planner adapted to the strain-based formulation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and applicability of the proposed approach for robotic manipulation of hybrid assemblies in constrained environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a quasi-static optimization-based manipulation planner for hybrid deformable-rigid objects (hDLOs) in constrained environments, using a strain-based Cosserat rod model for efficient inverse kinetostatic solutions and trajectory optimization, validated in simulation and experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于准静态优化的混合可变形-刚性物体（hDLOs）在受限环境中的操作规划器，利用基于应变的Cosserat杆模型实现高效的反向运动静力学解和轨迹优化，并通过仿真和实验验证。
summary_zh:
摘要：
针对绳索、线缆等可变形线性物体（DLO）的协同机器人操控已得到广泛研究，但在受限环境中处理由可变形与刚性元件组成的混合装配体（hDLO）仍具挑战性。本研究提出一种基于准静态优化的操控规划器，采用基于应变的Cosserat杆模型，将刚体公式扩展至混合可变形线性物体。该规划器利用可变形链节的顺应性在约束条件下进行操控，同时实现刚性工具无法达成的物体任务空间目标。通过采用具有解析梯度的可微分模型，该方法在逆静运动学（IKS）问题上较有限差分基线实现最高33倍的加速。此外，基于IKS解热启动的后续轨迹优化问题，唯有通过解析导数才能实际求解。所提算法在多种hDLO系统的仿真中及双机械臂机器人系统于受限环境操控的三链节hDLO实验中得到验证。实验结果表明规划器具有较高精度，标记点目标位置与实测位置间的平均形变误差约为3厘米（占可变形链节长度的5%）。最后，将所提出的优化规划器与适配应变公式的基于采样的可行性规划器进行对比，结果证实了该方法在受限环境下操控混合装配体的有效性和适用性。

title: Beyond Imitation: Reinforcement Learning Fine-Tuning for Adaptive Diffusion Navigation Policies
summary: Diffusion-based robot navigation policies trained on large-scale imitation learning datasets, can generate multi-modal trajectories directly from the robot's visual observations, bypassing the traditional localization-mapping-planning pipeline and achieving strong zero-shot generalization. However, their performance remains constrained by the coverage of offline datasets, and when deployed in unseen settings, distribution shift often leads to accumulated trajectory errors and safety-critical failures. Adapting diffusion policies with reinforcement learning is challenging because their iterative denoising structure hinders effective gradient backpropagation, while also making the training of an additional value network computationally expensive and less stable. To address these issues, we propose a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework tailored for diffusion-based navigation. The method leverages the inherent multi-trajectory sampling mechanism of diffusion models and adopts Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which estimates relative advantages across sampled trajectories without requiring a separate value network. To preserve pretrained representations while enabling adaptation, we freeze the visual encoder and selectively update the higher decoder layers and action head, enhancing safety-aware behaviors through online environmental feedback. On the PointGoal task in Isaac Sim, our approach improves the Success Rate from 52.0% to 58.7% and SPL from 0.49 to 0.54 on unseen scenes, while reducing collision frequency. Additional experiments show that the fine-tuned policy transfers zero-shot to a real quadruped platform and maintains stable performance in geometrically out-of-distribution environments, suggesting improved adaptability and safe generalization to new domains.
tldr: The paper proposes a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework for diffusion-based robot navigation policies to improve adaptability and safety in unseen environments, achieving better performance metrics and zero-shot transfer to real platforms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于扩散基机器人导航策略的强化学习微调框架，以提高在未知环境中的适应性和安全性，实现了更好的性能指标和零样本迁移到真实平台。
summary_zh: 基于大规模模仿学习数据集训练的扩散机器人导航策略，能够直接从机器人视觉观测生成多模态轨迹，绕开传统的定位-建图-规划流程，实现强大的零样本泛化能力。然而，其性能仍受限于离线数据集的覆盖范围，在未见过的新环境中部署时，分布偏移常导致轨迹误差累积和安全关键性故障。采用强化学习对扩散策略进行调优存在挑战：其迭代去噪结构阻碍了有效的梯度反向传播，同时训练额外价值网络会带来高昂计算成本与稳定性问题。针对这些问题，我们提出专为扩散导航设计的强化学习微调框架。该方法利用扩散模型固有的多轨迹采样机制，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）通过采样轨迹间的相对优势估计替代独立价值网络。为在保持预训练表征的同时实现适应性，我们冻结视觉编码器并选择性更新高层解码器与动作头，通过在线环境反馈增强安全感知行为。在Isaac Sim的PointGoal任务中，该方法将未见过场景的成功率从52.0%提升至58.7%，SPL从0.49提升至0.54，同时降低碰撞频率。补充实验表明，微调后的策略能零样本迁移至真实四足机器人平台，并在几何分布外环境中保持稳定性能，显示出对新领域更强的适应性与安全泛化能力。

title: EB-RANSAC: Random Sample Consensus based on Energy-Based Model
summary: Random sample consensus (RANSAC), which is based on a repetitive sampling from a given dataset, is one of the most popular robust estimation methods. In this study, an energy-based model (EBM) for robust estimation that has a similar scheme to RANSAC, energy-based RANSAC (EB-RANSAC), is proposed. EB-RANSAC is applicable to a wide range of estimation problems similar to RANSAC. However, unlike RANSAC, EB-RANSAC does not require a troublesome sampling procedure and has only one hyperparameter. The effectiveness of EB-RANSAC is numerically demonstrated in two applications: a linear regression and maximum likelihood estimation.
tldr: The paper proposes EB-RANSAC, an energy-based model for robust estimation that simplifies RANSAC by eliminating the need for repetitive sampling and reducing hyperparameters, demonstrated in linear regression and maximum likelihood estimation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了EB-RANSAC，一种基于能量的鲁棒估计模型，通过消除重复采样和减少超参数来简化RANSAC，并在线性回归和最大似然估计中进行了验证。
summary_zh: 随机抽样一致算法（RANSAC）通过从给定数据集中重复采样，已成为最流行的鲁棒估计方法之一。本研究提出了一种与RANSAC具有相似框架的基于能量模型的鲁棒估计方法——基于能量的RANSAC（EB-RANSAC）。该方法与RANSAC类似，可广泛应用于各类估计问题。但与RANSAC不同的是，EB-RANSAC无需复杂的采样过程，且仅包含一个超参数。通过线性回归和最大似然估计两个应用场景的数值实验，验证了EB-RANSAC的有效性。
